system.flavor: You start up a bawdy ballad, inspiring your allies to acts of greater heroism.
system.effect:
Stance in this stance, gain the following interrupt.

Inspire
Interrupt 1
Trigger ally in range 1-3 uses an ability.
Effect ally can re-roll a single die rolled as part of this ability, taking the second roll as final.
Effect your ally is in crisis, they can re-roll two dice.

Weave this ability resolves, clear a negative status from yourself or an ally in range 1-3
